scenarios.name: Install and first launch
preconditions: User has Logi Options+ configured for bare horizontal scroll
steps: Open permission settings from app menu
Grant Accessibility and Input Monitoring manually
expected: No driver or system daemon is installed
User can enable after permissions are granted

scenarios.name: Chrome Option horizontal scroll zoom
steps: Move MX Master horizontal wheel right
Move MX Master horizontal wheel left
expected: Original horizontal scroll is swallowed only for this exact gesture

scenarios.name: Bare horizontal scroll pass-through
preconditions: Logi Options+ has existing bare horizontal scroll behavior
steps: Move MX Master horizontal wheel right and left
expected: ChromeWheelRouter does not inject zoom shortcuts

scenarios.name: Non-Chrome pass-through
steps: Move MX Master horizontal wheel right and left
expected: No Chrome zoom shortcut is sent

scenarios.name: Clean uninstall
steps: Remove app/config/logs using uninstall docs or script
expected: Logi Options+ and Chrome behavior return to baseline
